description: Positive-interest reply from validation_cell=CELL_3_SPECIALISED_B2B_AGENCY. Primarily exercises Workflow 1 Section D's campaign-context lookup for the third approved validation cell (B2B agencies / $5k+ retainer services), confirming nes.campaign_context is fully populated (not UNKNOWN) for this cell. Decision shape mirrors fixture 01 (POSITIVE_INTEREST, mock classifier match, no det-* rule).

input.reply_subject: Re: Predictable pipeline for your agency

expected.notes: validation_cell=CELL_3_SPECIALISED_B2B_AGENCY is recognised by Section D's CELL_DEFINITIONS, so nes.campaign_context is fully populated from docs/VALIDATION_CAMPAIGN_CONFIG.md (not the all-UNKNOWN fallback used for an unrecognised cell). 'Happy to discuss further' matches positiveRx ('happy to discuss'); no det-* rule fires (no pricing/booking/referral/legal/hostile language), so this is a mock-classifier match at confidence 0.75, identical decision shape to fixture 01.
